name: Shrimp and Sea Scallop Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 4 Celery stalks, cut into 1-inch pieces (at an angle)
2 Red bell peppers, seeded and julienned
2 Yellow bell peppers, seeded and julienned
2 Green bell peppers, seeded and julienned
1 bunch Scallions, cut into 1-inch pieces (at an angle)
1 teaspoon Dried red pepper flakes (or to taste)
1 pound Soba noodles, cooked al dente
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large, heated wok or sauté pan, place the oil and heat it on high until it just begins to smoke.
2. Add the shrimp and scallops, and stir-fry them for 3 minutes.
3. Add the carrots, celery, bell peppers, mushrooms, and garlic. Stir-fry for another 3 minutes.
4. Add the cilantro and scallions, tossing them in.
5. Add the lime juice, dried red pepper flakes, and sherry. Mix everything together and cook for 1 minute, or until the liquid is reduced by half.
6. Add the soy sauce and mix it in.
7. Add the soba noodles and toss them in.
